name: coi-tracker-mcp
description: MCP server for COI (Certificate of Insurance) tracking — analyze certificates, check expirations, verify coverage requirements, and manage vendor compliance

tools.name: analyze_coi
tools.description: Parse a Certificate of Insurance and extract named insured, coverage types, policy numbers, limits, expiration dates, and compliance flags

tools.name: check_coi_expiration
tools.description: Check if a policy is expired or expiring soon with urgency assessment and recommended actions

tools.name: coi_requirements
tools.description: Get standard COI requirements for an industry — required coverages, minimum limits, and endorsements

tools.name: verify_coi_compliance
tools.description: Cross-reference a vendor's COI against industry requirements and identify coverage gaps

tools.name: coi_info
tools.description: Get COI management best practices, ACORD 25 form information, and common compliance failures
